import numpy as np
survey_df = pd.DataFrame({'ID': [1001, 1002, 1003, 1004], 'Age': [25.0, np.nan, 29.0, np.nan]})
questions.prompt: Impute the missing data cells inside the 'Age' column by filling all NaN references with the static numerical scalar value 30. Print the finalized DataFrame.
